PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi t0,zero,4      00000000010000000000001010010011
0x0004		bne s0,s1,8         00000000100101000001010001100011
0x0008		addi t0,zero,5      00000000010100000000001010010011
0x000c		addi s1,s1,1        00000000000101001000010010010011
0x0010		bne s0,s1,label1    11111110100101000001101011100011
0x0014		addi s1,s1,1        00000000000101001000010010010011
0x0018		addi t0,zero,2      00000000001000000000001010010011
0x001c		addi t0,zero,6      00000000011000000000001010010011
0x0020		addi s0,s0,1        00000000000101000000010000010011
0x0024		jal ra,8            00000000100000000000000011101111
0x0028		jal t1,label3       00000000110000000000001101101111
0x002c		jal s2,-4           11111111110111111111100101101111
0x0030		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
0x0034		jal ra,-4           11111111110111111111000011101111
0x0038		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
